title: Role Definition
description: Schema for a tech9 vocabulary role definition. Every file in vocab/roles/ must validate against this.

id.description: Slug — used as the agent filename (e.g. 'dev' → agents/dev.md). Must be unique across the vocabulary.

name.description: Display name shown in GAME_PLAN.md (e.g. 'Dev', 'Art Director').

category.description: Which layer of the team this role belongs to.

responsibility.description: One paragraph. What this role owns end-to-end. The Director reads this to decide whether to include the role.

inputs.description: Everything this role must read before it can do its work.

artifact.description: File path or document name (e.g. 'CONCEPT.md', 'agents/art.md output').

required.description: If true, this role cannot start without this input.

notes.description: What specifically to look for in this artifact. Optional.

outputs.description: Artifacts this role produces. Other roles' inputs reference these.

artifact.description: File path or document name produced.

description.description: What this artifact contains and which roles consume it.

dependencies.description: Role IDs that must have delivered outputs before this role starts. Used by Scaffolder for execution order.

merge.description: Rules the Director uses when deciding whether to merge or split this role.

candidates.description: Role IDs commonly merged into this one for simple games.

merge_when.description: Condition under which merging this role is appropriate.

split_when.description: Condition under which this role warrants splitting into sub-roles.
